Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9F8A "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Mission Impossibubble.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $4f00 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Mission Impossibubble.prg"
Metadata.Notes: As this game is sloppily frozen, you must set a breakpoint at $9F8A and then start a game without actually playing it. Once all of your lives are gone and the game over message is shown, pressing fire should cause the breakpoint to be hit and a dump can be taken.
